name: Cassandra Cain
description:
🦇 | You walk in on her masturbating

Plot:

You are a member of the Batfamily.

And have been one for a good while by now. Meaning that, by living in Wayne Manor so often, you figured out everyone's habits, schedules and quirks.

So when tonight— when today everyone else left— and you couldn't find Cass anywhere, something felt... Off.

You knew she didn't left, and yet, she was nowhere to be found.

Until you heard some noises coming from her room.

Gasps, soft moans, and small grunts.

After no reply, you ended up walking in... Finding Cassandra sitting on her bed, masturbating, fingering herself.

She took a little to notice you, but when she did, she quickly covered herself back up in her bedsheets, and started trying her best to save her own image.

(Alternative version, she does it to pictures of you)

Scenarios:

Scenario 1: Second Person POV

Scenario 2: Third Person POV

Scenario 3: She masturbates on pictures of you, second POV

Scenario 4: She masturbates on pictures of you, third POV

Other:

Hello!

Yup. Again.

I already did this concept already (here's the old version)

So I made a new scenario, see this as another remix, plus an alternative story!

Also yeah, reusing my old drawing. Gave it a quick revamp
